prompt: Create a soft, luminous vertical anime-style romantic close-up portrait of two characters facing each other intimately against a bright white backlit background. The taller character, Claude, is on the right, shown from forehead to chest, with pale skin, ash-blond swept-back layered hair, a visible ear, long neck, and a dark open jacket over a light V-neck shirt; his head leans down toward the shorter character. The shorter character, Mai, is on the lower left in profile, with pale skin, short slightly messy black bob hair, a visible ear, and a black hooded top, looking upward toward him while holding or touching his clothing with clasped hands near the lower right. Use delicate semi-realistic anime rendering, fine hair strands, soft rim light, gentle pastel skin tones, shallow depth of field, tender emotional atmosphere, and a clean high-key white background. Add large semi-opaque rectangular censor blocks over the characters’ faces: one tall dusty rose-gray rectangle covering most of the woman’s face and central area, and one larger pale taupe rectangle covering the man’s face and upper center-right, overlapping the first block in an offset L-shaped arrangement. Overlay a faint oversized circular watermark emblem across the whole image. Include exactly 3 visible text elements: a white copyright line near the lower left reading “©ImaginaryGate”, a partially visible white credit line across the lower middle-right reading “ctMRA | Mai”, and an elegant white cursive caption at the bottom right reading “Mai & Claude”. The composition should feel like a tender farewell or emotional reunion, with soft cinematic lighting and polished digital illustration quality.
